summary: Frontend-only visual verification of crystality.win-style redesign. All 6 review-request requirements PASS — pure-black background, near-pure-black feature cards, deep violet icon glow, icon animates (scale+rotate) on card hover, exact 224deg multi-stop .btn-primary gradient with rgb(111,0,255) inset bottom shadow, and mobile viewport is clean.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.js is 632 lines — extract Hero / Features / Pricing / FAQ into subcomponents before crossing 700 LOC.
Pre-existing telemetry 401 console noise still present (not caused by this redesign; can be ignored per request).
Per iteration 8 note: .btn-primary still lacks a data-testid — 'hero-cta-primary' exists but generic .btn-primary used in multiple spots is hard to target reliably.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Crystality-style verified end-to-end. Desktop screenshot (1920x1080) shows 2x2 feature grid with near-pure-black cards, tight violet icon cubes, top-center violet halo. Hover on .feature-card produces svg transform matrix(1.114, 0.117, -0.117, 1.114) = scale 1.114 + rotate ~6deg, icon translateY -8.75px scale 1.056, icon box-shadow intensifies from violet 0.55 alpha to 0.8. Mobile 390x844: #features grid-template-columns='358px' single column, bg-orb::after display=none, horiz_overflow=0, scrolled to 5443px with zero page errors. Lenis smooth scroll is active; disable by removing lenis/lenis-smooth classes on <html>.

background.bg_orb_background: radial-gradient 55%x45% at 50% -5% rgba(98,0,255,0.22) + radial 40%x35% at 92% 92% rgba(89,0,255,0.1) + black base

feature_icon_default.bg: radial rgba(205,173,255,0.55) + linear-gradient violet to rgb(98,0,255) to rgb(53,0,150)

feature_card_hover.icon_box_shadow: violet glow jumps to rgba(98,0,255,0.75) 0 22px 40px -6px + rgba(98,0,255,0.8) 0 0 62px -2px — BRIGHTER

verification_details.page_errors_new: 0 new pageerror / uncaught exceptions beyond pre-existing telemetry 401 console noise
